name: Homemade Wheat Thins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients.
2. Add oil/water mixture.
3. Knead as little as possible to form smooth dough.
4. Roll the dough as thin as possible on an un-oiled cookie sheet (no more than 1/8 inch).
5. Mark with a knife to desired cracker size, but do not cut through.
6. Prick each cracker a few times with a fork.
7. Sprinkle lightly with salt or onion salt if desired.
8. Bake at 350°F until crisp and light brown for 30-35 minutes.
